summary_en: 12,715,775 shares acquired at ¥1,280/share (total consideration ¥16.3 billion). Tender offer period: 7 Apr – 22 May 2026. Minimum acceptance threshold 4,165,600 shares met (exceeded). Target becomes subsidiary on 28 May 2026 (settlement). Acquirer had 0% pre-offer; affiliate SBI Holdings held 51.95% (14,705,000 shares, non-tendering).
title_en: Notice on Completion of Tender Offer for THE Global Co., Inc. (Security Code 3271) and Related Change in Affiliated Companies
translation_en_brief: On 23 May 2026, Daito Trust Construction announced completion of a tender offer for THE Global Co., Inc. (TSE Standard Market, code 3271). The offer ran from 7 April to 22 May 2026 and acquired 12,715,775 shares at ¥1,280 per share, totaling approximately ¥16.3 billion in consideration. The minimum acceptance threshold of 4,165,600 shares was exceeded, triggering mandatory acquisition of all tendered shares. Upon settlement on 28 May 2026, THE Global will become an affiliate of Daito Trust Construction. Prior to the offer, Daito held no shares; affiliate SBI Holdings (THE Global's parent and largest shareholder) held 14,705,000 shares (51.95% stake) and did not participate in the tender, preserving its control position post-acquisition.
